jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at ISRO
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at ISRO. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Ahmedabad-based team.

About ISRO:
ISRO is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ISRO!
